parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body;
const b = body.booking;

return [{
  json: {
    ID:         b.id,
    Name:       b.name,
    Phone:      b.phone,
    Email:      b.email || '',
    Date:       b.date,
    Table:      b.table,
    Time:       b.time,
    Guests:     String(b.guests),
    Status:     b.status || 'confirmed',
    Source:     b.source || 'online',
    Notes:      b.notes || '',
    Created_At: b.created_at || new Date().toISOString(),
    _email:     b.email || '',
    _name:      b.name,
    _id:        b.id,
    _date:      b.date,
    _time:      b.time,
    _guests:    String(b.guests),
  }
}];

parameters.subject: Thanks for  Booking.
